heading: Supplement, not supplant
label: 7120 Supplement, not supplant
text: Funds made available under this subpart shall be used to supplement, and not supplant, non-Federal funds that would otherwise be used for activities authorized under this subpart.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2015 Amendment note under .Dec. 10, 2015section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95section 6301 of this title
